mapper.sql: id, subcontractName, contractNos, projectIds, type, state, callbackState, facilitatorId, facilitatorName, bankInfo, bankAccount, officeCode, profitDepCode, subcontractNo, isAccrued, isInvoiced, subcontractAmount, reason, remark, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, zrApproveTime, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, customInfo, orgId
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_header (subcontractName, contractNos, projectIds, type, state, callbackState, facilitatorId, officeCode, profitDepCode, facilitatorName, bankInfo, bankAccount, subcontractNo, isAccrued, isInvoiced, subcontractAmount, reason, remark, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, zrApproveTime, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, orgId, customInfo) values (#{subcontractName}, #{contractNos}, #{projectIds}, #{type}, #{state}, #{callbackState}, #{facilitatorId}, #{officeCode}, #{profitDepCode}, #{facilitatorName}, #{bankInfo}, #{bankAccount}, #{subcontractNo}, #{isAccrued}, #{isInvoiced}, #{subcontractAmount}, #{reason}, #{remark}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{zrApproveTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{orgId}, #customInfo:JSON#)
mapper.update:
update pm_subcontract_project_header set subcontractName = #{subcontractName}, contractNos = #{contractNos}, projectIds = #{projectIds}, type = #{type}, state = #{state}, callbackState = #{callbackState}, facilitatorId = #{facilitatorId}, facilitatorName = #{facilitatorName}, bankInfo = #{bankInfo}, bankAccount = #{bankAccount}, officeCode = #{officeCode}, profitDepCode = #{profitDepCode}, subcontractNo = #{subcontractNo}, isAccrued = #{isAccrued}, isInvoiced = #{isInvoiced}, subcontractAmount = #{subcontractAmount}, reason = #{reason}, remark = #{remark}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo}, zrApproveTime = #{zrApproveTime}, createBy = #{createBy}, createTime = #{createTime}, updateBy = #{updateBy}, updateTime = #{updateTime}, orgId = #{orgId},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# ) where id = #{id}
mapper.sql:
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t.`subcontractId`, t.confirmTime, t.paymentTime, t.remark, maxPay.paidAmount, t.customInfo FROM `pm_subcontract_project_payment` t INNER JOIN (SELECT
MAX(id) AS maxPayId, SUM( IF( paymentTime IS NOT NULL, CONVERT( REPLACE(IFNULL(customInfo ->> '$$.paidAmount', amount), ",", ""), DECIMAL (25, 2) ), 0 ) ) AS paidAmount FROM `pm_subcontract_project_payment` GROUP BY subcontractId) maxPay ON t.id = maxPay.maxPayId ) spp ON spp.subcontractId = h.`id`

<if test=" prepend="AND" property="customInfo.paymentStatus"> #customInfo.paymentStatus# = spp.`customInfo` ->> '$$.status' <if test=" prepend="AND" property="customInfo.paid"> #customInfo.paid# = spp.`customInfo` ->> '$$.paid'
mapper.select: SELECT sph.*, bd.`basicDataName` as stateName, bd1.`basicDataName` as callbackStateName, CONCAT(sph.createBy, "-", ui.`realName`) AS createName, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, d2.`departmentName` AS profitDepName, bd2.`basicDataName` as typeName FROM pm_subcontract_project_header sph LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON sph.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN fnd_department d2 ON sph.`profitDepCode` = d2.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.`basicDataId` = sph.`state` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON bd1.`basicDataId` = sph.`callbackState` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractCbState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON sph.`type` = bd2.`basicDataId` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractType' LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.`username` = sph.`createBy` where sph.id = #{id}
mapper.sql: id, subcontractId, projectId, barCode, itemCode, itemModel, itemName, contractNo, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_line (subcontractId, projectId, barCode, itemCode, itemModel, itemName, contractNo, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy) values (#{subcontractId}, #{projectId}, #{barCode}, #{itemCode}, #{itemModel}, #{itemName}, #{contractNo}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateTime}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: update pm_subcontract_project_line set subcontractId = #{subcontractId}, projectId = #{projectId}, barCode = #{barCode}, itemCode = #{itemCode}, itemModel = #{itemModel}, itemName = #{itemName}, contractNo = #{contractNo}, createTime = #{createTime}, createBy = #{createBy}, updateTime = #{updateTime}, updateBy = #{updateBy} where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into pm_subcontract_project_line (subcontractId, projectId, itemModel, contractNo, barCode, itemCode, itemName <if test=" prepend="," createBy> createTime, createBy <if test=" prepend="," updateBy> updateTime, updateBy ) Select #{subcontractId}, ph.projectId, fi.`itemname` AS itemModel, t.* <if test=" prepend="," createBy> now(), #{createBy} <if test=" prepend="," updateBy> null, null From ( SELECT DISTINCT vsip.contract_code contractNo, vsip.barcode barCode, vsip.itemCode itemCode, vsip.itemName itemName FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code in ($contractNos$) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pm_project_shipment pps1 WHERE vsip.barcode = pps1.barcode and contractNo in ($contractNos$) and projectId in ($projectIds$) ) UNION SELECT `contractNo`, `barcode` as barCode, `itemCode`,`itemName` FROM pm_project_shipment pps WHERE contractNo in ($contractNos$) and projectId in ($projectIds$) AND transferFlag != 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE FIND_IN_SET(vsip.contract_code ,REPLACE(REPLACE(#{contractNos}, '-C', ''), "'",'')) AND vsip.barcode = pps.barcode) ) t LEFT JOIN fb_items fi ON fi.`item` = t.itemCode LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` pc ON pc.`contractNo` = t.contractNo AND pc.`contractNo` IN ($contractNos$) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group` pg ON pc.`projectGroupCode` = pg.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` gr ON gr.`projectGroupCode` = pg.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_header` ph ON ph.`projectId` IN ($projectIds$) AND gr.`projectCode` = ph.`projectCode` WHERE ph.`projectId` IS NOT NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(t.barCode, #{barCodes}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE projectId = VALUES(projectId), barCode = VALUES(barCode), itemCode = VALUES(itemCode), itemModel = VALUES(itemModel), itemName = VALUES(itemName), contractNo = VALUES(contractNo), updateBy = #{updateBy}, updateTime = now()
mapper.delete:
delete from pm_subcontract_project_line
<if test=" prepend="and" subcontractId> subcontractId = -1 <if test=" prepend="and" subcontractId> subcontractId = #{subcontractId} <if test=" prepend="and" barCodes> !FIND_IN_SET(barCode, #{barCodes})
mapper.sql: id, name, code, account, bankInfo, bankAccount, receiver, email, state, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_facilitator (name, code, account, bankInfo, bankAccount, receiver, email, state, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime) values (#{name}, #{code}, #{account}, #{bankInfo}, #{bankAccount}, #{receiver}, #{email}, #{state}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update pm_subcontract_facilitator set name = #{name}, code = #{code}, account = #{account}, bankInfo = #{bankInfo}, bankAccount = #{bankAccount}, receiver = #{receiver}, email = #{email}, state = #{state}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo}, createBy = #{createBy}, createTime = #{createTime}, updateBy = #{updateBy}, updateTime = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.sql: id, subcontractId, paymentId, fileName, filePath, type, uploadBy, uploadTime, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, customInfo
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_deliver_files (subcontractId, paymentId, fileName, filePath, type, uploadBy, uploadTime, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, customInfo) values (#{subcontractId}, #{paymentId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{type}, #{uploadBy}, #{uploadTime}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{customInfo})
mapper.update:
update pm_subcontract_deliver_files set subcontractId = #{subcontractId}, paymentId = #{paymentId}, fileName = #{fileName}, filePath = #{filePath}, type = #{type}, uploadBy = #{uploadBy}, uploadTime = #{uploadTime}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# ) where id = #{id}
mapper.sql: id, subcontractId, ratio, amount, confirmTime, paymentTime, remark, sseId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, customInfo
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_payment (subcontractId, ratio, amount, confirmTime, paymentTime, remark, sseId, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy, customInfo ) values (#{subcontractId}, #{ratio}, FORMAT(REPLACE(#{amount}, ",", ""), 2), #{confirmTime}, #{paymentTime}, #{remark}, #{sseId}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateTime}, #{updateBy}, #customInfo:JSON# )
mapper.update:
update pm_subcontract_project_payment set subcontractId = #{subcontractId}, ratio = #{ratio}, amount = FORMAT(REPLACE(#{amount}, ",", ""), 2), confirmTime = #{confirmTime}, paymentTime = #{paymentTime}, remark = #{remark}, sseId = #{sseId}, createTime = #{createTime}, createBy = #{createBy}, updateTime = #{updateTime}, updateBy = #{updateBy},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# ) where id = #{id}
mapper.sql: id, subcontractId, taskKey, taskId, quesnaireId, quesnaireVersion, quesnaireState, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, customInfo
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_callback (subcontractId, taskKey, taskId, quesnaireId, quesnaireVersion, quesnaireState, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, customInfo) values (#{subcontractId}, #{taskKey}, #{taskId}, #{quesnaireId}, #{quesnaireVersion}, #{quesnaireState}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{customInfo})
mapper.update: update pm_subcontract_project_callback set subcontractId = #{subcontractId}, taskKey = #{taskKey}, taskId = #{taskId}, quesnaireId = #{quesnaireId}, quesnaireVersion = #{quesnaireVersion}, quesnaireState = #{quesnaireState}, createBy = #{createBy}, createTime = #{createTime}, updateBy = #{updateBy}, updateTime = #{updateTime}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo}, customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id FROM pm_subcontract_project_callback WHERE subcontractId = #{subcontractId} AND taskId = #{taskId}
<if test=" prepend="AND" taskKey> taskKey = #{taskKey}

SELECT quesnaireId FROM pm_subcontract_project_callback WHERE subcontractId = #{subcontractId} AND taskId = #{taskId}
<if test=" prepend="AND" taskKey> taskKey = #{taskKey}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pm_subcontract_project_callback WHERE subcontractId = #{subcontractId}
<if test=" prepend="AND" taskKey> taskKey = #{taskKey}
mapper.sql: id, subcontractName, contractNos, projectIds, type, state, callbackState, facilitatorId, facilitatorName, bankInfo, bankAccount, officeCode, profitDepCode, subcontractNo, isAccrued, subcontractAmount, reason, remark, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into pm_subcontract_project_price (subcontractId, contractNo, orderExecNumber, projectCode, engineeFee, objId, procType, price, createTime, createBy, updateTime, updateBy ) values (#{subcontractId}, #{contractNo}, #{orderExecNumber}, #{projectCode}, #{engineeFee}, #{objId}, #{procType}, #{price}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateTime}, #{updateBy} )
mapper.update: update pm_subcontract_project_price set subcontractId = #{subcontractId}, contractNo = #{contractNo}, orderExecNumber = #{orderExecNumber}, projectCode = #{projectCode}, engineeFee = #{engineeFee}, objId = #{objId}, procType = #{procType}, price = #{price}, createTime = #{createTime}, createBy = #{createBy}, updateTime = #{updateTime}, updateBy = #{updateBy} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select * from ( SELECT `ph`.`projectId` AS `projectId`, `ph`.`projectCode` AS `projectCode`, `rank`.`basicDataName` AS `rank`, ( CASE WHEN ( `pr`.`mergeBranchMark` IS NOT NULL ) THEN CONCAT( `ph`.`projectName`, '-', `pr`.`mergeBranchMark` ) ELSE `ph`.`projectName` END ) AS `projectName`, `fd`.`basicDataName` AS `projectStateName`, `ph`.`projectState` AS `projectState`, GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT `pc`.`contractNo` SEPARATOR ',' ) AS `contractNo`, `ph`.`column001` AS `officeCode`, `d`.`departmentName` AS `officeName` FROM `pm_project_header` `ph` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` `pr` ON ( ( `ph`.`projectCode` = `pr`.`projectCode` ) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` `pc` ON ( ( `pr`.`projectGroupCode` = `pc`.`projectGroupCode` ) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group` `pg` ON ( `pr`.`projectGroupCode` = `pg`.`projectGroupCode` ) AND (`pg`.`projectType` = '10') LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `fd` ON ( `fd`.`basicDataId` = `ph`.`projectState` ) AND (`fd`.`dataTypeCode` = '02') AND (`fd`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW()) AND ( (`fd`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`fd`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `rank` ON ( `ph`.`column010` = `rank`.`basicDataId` ) AND (`rank`.`dataTypeCode` = '05') AND (`rank`.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW()) AND ( (`rank`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`rank`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `fnd_department` `d` ON ( `d`.`departmentNum` = `ph`.`column001` ) where ISNULL(`ph`.`effectiveTo`)
<if test=" prepend="AND" projectIds> FIND_IN_SET(`ph`.projectId, #{projectIds})
GROUP BY `ph`.`projectCode` ) t
<if test=" contractNos>
contractNo like CONCAT('%', #contractNos[]#, '%')
<if test=" prepend="AND" projectIds> FIND_IN_SET(projectId, #{projectIds})

SELECT *, `rank`.`basicDataName` AS `rank`, `fd`.`basicDataName` AS `projectStateName`, `d`.`departmentName` AS `officeName` FROM (SELECT `ph`.`projectId` AS `projectId`, `ph`.`projectCode` AS `projectCode`, ( CASE WHEN ( `pr`.`mergeBranchMark` IS NOT NULL ) THEN CONCAT( `ph`.`projectName`, '-', `pr`.`mergeBranchMark` ) ELSE `ph`.`projectName` END ) AS `projectName`, `ph`.`projectState` AS `projectState`, GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT `pc`.`contractNo` SEPARATOR ',' ) AS `contractNo`, `ph`.`column001` AS `officeCode`, ph.`column010`, ph.salesType FROM `pm_project_header` `ph` LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group_relationship` `pr` ON ( ( `ph`.`projectCode` = `pr`.`projectCode` ) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_contract` `pc` ON ( ( `pr`.`projectGroupCode` = `pc`.`projectGroupCode` ) ) LEFT JOIN `pm_project_group` `pg` ON ( `pr`.`projectGroupCode` = `pg`.`projectGroupCode` ) AND (`pg`.`projectType` = '10') WHERE ISNULL(`ph`.`effectiveTo`) <if test=" prepend="AND" projectIds> FIND_IN_SET(`ph`.projectId, #{projectIds}) <if test=" contractNos> <if test=" prepend="AND" projectIds> `ph`.projectId = -1
<if test=" projectIdList> #projectIdList[]#
GROUP BY `ph`.`projectCode` ) t
LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `fd` ON ( `fd`.`basicDataId` = `t`.`projectState` ) AND (`fd`.`dataTypeCode` = '02') AND (`fd`.`effectiveFrom` < NOW()) AND ( (`fd`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`fd`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` `rank` ON ( `t`.`column010` = `rank`.`basicDataId` ) AND (`rank`.`dataTypeCode` = '05') AND (`rank`.`effectiveFrom` <= NOW()) AND ( (`rank`.`effectiveTo` > NOW()) OR ISNULL(`rank`.`effectiveTo`) ) LEFT JOIN `fnd_department` `d` ON ( `d`.`departmentNum` = `t`.`officeCode` )
<if test=" contractNos>
contractNo like CONCAT('%', #contractNos[]#, '%')
<if test=" projectIdList> #projectIdList[]#
<if test=" prepend="AND" projectIds> FIND_IN_SET(projectId, #{projectIds}) <if test=" contractNos> <if test=" prepend="AND" projectIds> projectId = -1

select * from ( SELECT DISTINCT vsip.contract_code contractNo, vsip.barcode barCode, vsip.itemCode itemCode, vsip.itemName itemName, NULL AS chProjectId, NULL AS chContractNo, NULL AS transferProjectId, NULL AS transferContractNo, -1 AS transferFlag, vsip.barcode2 barCode2, vsip.itemCode2 itemCode2, vsip.itemName2 itemName2 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code in ($contractNos$) AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM pm_project_shipment pps1 WHERE vsip.barcode = pps1.barcode and contractNo in ($contractNos$) and projectId in ($projectIds$) ) <if test=" contractProfitCenter>
vsip.contract_code = #contractProfitCenter[].sourceContractNo# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="contractProfitCenter[].officeCode"> vsip.`profitCenter` = #contractProfitCenter[].officeCode#
UNION ALL SELECT pps.`contractNo`,pps.`barcode`,pps.`itemCode`,pps.`itemName`, pps.chProjectId, pps.chContractNo, pps.transferProjectId, pps.transferContractNo, pps.transferFlag, sbr.sn2 AS barCode2, sbr.item2 AS itemCode2, fi.describe_ AS itemName2 FROM pm_project_shipment pps LEFT JOIN `fb_shipment_barcode_relation` sbr ON sbr.contract = REPLACE(pps.contractNo, '-C', '') AND pps.barcode = sbr.sn1 LEFT JOIN `fb_items` fi ON fi.item = sbr.item2 WHERE contractNo in ($contractNos$) and projectId in ($projectIds$) <if test=" prepend="AND" excludeTransferOut compareValue="true">transferFlag != 1 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId WHERE vsip.contract_code IN ($sourceContractNos$)
AND vsip.barcode = pps.barcode) ORDER BY transferFlag asc) t order by t.contractNo, t.itemCode

SELECT pfs.`orderExecNumber`, dfs.`contractNo`, pfs.`projectCode`, CASE WHEN pfs.`engineeFee` IS NOT NULL THEN pfs.engineeFee ELSE 0 END AS engineeFee, pfs.`objId`, pfs.`applyType` as procType FROM `pm_project_property_from_sms` pfs LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` dfs ON pfs.`orderExecNumber` = dfs.`orderExecNumber` WHERE dfs.`contractNo` IS NOT NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(dfs.contractNo, #{contractNos})

SELECT t.`orderExecNumber`, t.`contractNo`, t.`projectCode`, t.engineeFee, t.`objId`, t.procType <if test=" prepend="," subcontractId> spp.`id`, spp.subcontractId, spp.`price` FROM (SELECT MAX(pfs.`orderExecNumber`) AS `orderExecNumber`, dfs.`contractNo`, pfs.`projectCode`, CASE WHEN pfs.`engineeFee` IS NOT NULL THEN pfs.engineeFee ELSE 0 END AS engineeFee, pfs.`objId`, pfs.`applyType` AS procType FROM `pm_project_property_from_sms` pfs LEFT JOIN `pm_order_data_from_sap` dfs ON pfs.`orderExecNumber` = dfs.`orderExecNumber` WHERE dfs.`contractNo` IS NOT NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(dfs.contractNo, #{contractNos}) GROUP BY dfs.contractNo, pfs.projectCode, pfs.objId, pfs.applyType) t <if test=" prepend=" " subcontractId> LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_price` spp ON t.`orderExecNumber` = spp.`orderExecNumber` AND t.contractNo = spp.contractNo AND t.projectCode = spp.`projectCode` AND spp.subcontractId = #{subcontractId} AND FIND_IN_SET(spp.contractNo, #{contractNos})
order by t.contractNo, t.orderExecNumber

SELECT DISTINCT RES.* FROM ACT_RU_TASK RES INNER JOIN ACT_RU_VARIABLE A0 ON RES.PROC_INST_ID_ = A0.PROC_INST_ID_ INNER JOIN ACT_RE_PROCDEF D ON RES.PROC_DEF_ID_ = D.ID_ INNER JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_header` h ON h.`id` = A0.`LONG_` AND A0.NAME_ = 'subcontractId' AND A0.TASK_ID_ IS NULL AND A0.NAME_ = 'subcontractId' AND A0.TYPE_ = 'integer' AND h.effectiveTo IS NULL WHERE RES.SUSPENSION_STATE_ = 1 <if test=" processKey prepend="AND"> D.KEY_ = #{processKey}
<if test=" processKey prepend="AND">
D.KEY_ in ('Subcontract', 'SubcontractCallBack', 'SubcontractInspection')
<if test=" taskId prepend="AND"> RES.ID_ = #{taskId}
<if test=" taskKey prepend="AND">
RES.TASK_DEF_KEY_ = #taskKey[]#
<if test=" subcontractId prepend="AND"> (A0.NAME_ = 'subcontractId' AND A0.TYPE_ = 'integer' AND A0.LONG_ = #{subcontractId} )
AND ( <if test=" assignee prepend=""> <if test=" roleGroup prepend=""> 1 = 1
<if test=" assignee prepend=""> (RES.ASSIGNEE_ = #{assignee} OR (RES.ASSIGNEE_ IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ACT_RU_IDENTITYLINK I LEFT JOIN `act_id_group` g ON g.`ID_` = i.`GROUP_ID_` AND i.`TYPE_` = 'candidate' LEFT JOIN `act_id_membership` im ON im.`GROUP_ID_` = g.`ID_` WHERE I.TASK_ID_ = RES.ID_ AND I.TYPE_ = 'candidate' AND (I.USER_ID_ = #{assignee} OR im.`USER_ID_` = #{assignee}) ) ) )
<if test=" roleGroup prepend="OR" open="(" close=")">
FIND_IN_SET(RES.ASSIGNEE_, #{roleGroup} ) <if test=" checkAll prepend="and"> ( FIND_IN_SET(h.`officeCode`, #{areaPower}) OR FIND_IN_SET(h.`profitDepCode`, #{areaPower}) OR FIND_IN_SET(h.customInfo ->> '$$.parentOfficeCode', #{areaPower}) )
<if test=" checkOffice prepend="and"> FIND_IN_SET(h.`officeCode`, #{areaPower})
<if test=" checkProfitDep prepend="and"> FIND_IN_SET(h.`profitDepCode`, #{areaPower})
<if test=" checkParentOffice prepend="and"> FIND_IN_SET(h.customInfo ->> '$$.parentOfficeCode', #{areaPower})
<if test=" roleGroups>
<if test=" property="roleGroups[].roleGroup" prepend="OR" open="(" close=")"> RES.ASSIGNEE_ = #roleGroups[].roleGroup# <if test=" property="roleGroups[].checkAll" prepend="and"> ( FIND_IN_SET(h.`officeCode`, #{areaPower}) OR FIND_IN_SET(h.`profitDepCode`, #{areaPower}) OR FIND_IN_SET(h.customInfo ->> '$$.parentOfficeCode', #{areaPower}) )
<if test=" property="roleGroups[].checkOffice" prepend="and"> FIND_IN_SET(h.`officeCode`, #{areaPower})
<if test=" property="roleGroups[].checkProfitDep" prepend="and"> FIND_IN_SET(h.`profitDepCode`, #{areaPower})
<if test=" property="roleGroups[].checkParentOffice" prepend="and"> FIND_IN_SET(h.customInfo ->> '$$.parentOfficeCode', #{areaPower})
) ORDER BY RES.CREATE_TIME_ DESC

SELECT rp.NAME_ AS processName, bd.basicDataName AS statusName, ht.NAME_ AS taskName, ach.message AS 'comment', ach.assigneeTime, CASE WHEN ach.`procdefKey` = 'SubcontractCallback' THEN spc.subcontractId ELSE ach.objId END AS subcontractId, CASE WHEN ach.taskId = spc.taskId THEN spc.quesnaireId ELSE NULL END AS quesnaireId, CASE WHEN ui.username IS NULL THEN ach.assignee ELSE CONCAT(ach.assignee, "-", ui.realName) END AS assigneeName, ach.nextAssignee, ach.nextAssigneeName FROM `fnd_act_hi_comment` ach LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_callback` spc ON ach.`objId` = spc.`id` AND ach.`procdefKey` = 'SubcontractCallback'
LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON bd.dataTypeCode = 'subcontractWorkFlowState' AND bd.basicDataId = ach.result LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.username = ach.assignee LEFT JOIN `act_hi_taskinst` ht ON ht.ID_ = ach.taskId AND ht.PROC_INST_ID_ = ach.instId LEFT JOIN `act_re_procdef` rp ON rp.ID_ = ht.PROC_DEF_ID_ WHERE ( ach.`procdefKey` = 'SubcontractCallback' <if test=" prepend="AND" > spc.`subcontractId` = #{subcontractId} ) OR ( ach.`procdefKey` in ('Subcontract', 'SubcontractInspection') <if test=" prepend="AND" > ach.`objId` = #{subcontractId} ) ORDER BY ach.`assigneeTime` ASC

SELECT h.*, d.`departmentName` AS officeName, d1.`departmentName` AS profitDepName, bd.`basicDataName` AS stateName, bd1.`basicDataName` AS callbackStateName, bd2.basicDataName as typeName, CONCAT(h.createBy, "-", ui.`realName`) AS createName FROM pm_subcontract_project_header h LEFT JOIN fnd_department d ON h.`officeCode` = d.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN fnd_department d1 ON h.`profitDepCode` = d1.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd ON h.`state` = bd.`basicDataId` AND bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd1 ON h.`callbackState` = bd1.`basicDataId` AND bd1.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractCbState' LEFT JOIN `fnd_basic_data` bd2 ON h.`type` = bd2.`basicDataId` AND bd2.`dataTypeCode` = 'subcontractType' LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.`username` = h.`createBy` WHERE h.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND FIND_IN_SET(#{projectIds}, h.projectIds);
SELECT SUM(REPLACE(amount, ",", "")) as paiedAmount FROM `pm_subcontract_project_payment` WHERE paymentTime IS NOT NULL and subcontractId = #{subcontractId} GROUP BY subcontractId

SELECT ph.*, ppp.lastPaymentTime, ppp.monthDiff FROM ACT_RU_TASK ret INNER JOIN ACT_RU_VARIABLE arv ON ret.PROC_INST_ID_ = arv.PROC_INST_ID_ INNER JOIN (SELECT MAX(paymentTime) AS lastPaymentTime, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH, MAX(paymentTime), NOW()) AS monthDiff, subcontractId FROM pm_subcontract_project_payment ppp WHERE paymentTime IS NOT NULL GROUP BY subcontractId) ppp ON ppp.`subcontractId` = arv.`LONG_` AND arv.NAME_ = 'subcontractId' AND arv.TASK_ID_ IS NULL AND arv.NAME_ = 'subcontractId' AND arv.TYPE_ = 'integer' INNER JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_header` ph ON ph.`id` = ppp.`subcontractId` AND ph.`type` = '10' AND ph.effectiveTo is NULL WHERE ret.TASK_DEF_KEY_ = 'applyPaymentTask' AND ppp.monthDiff >= 10 AND DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT( DATE_ADD( ppp.lastPaymentTime, INTERVAL ppp.monthDiff MONTH ), '%Y-%m-%d' )

SELECT NULL AS id , sph.`id` AS subcontractId, ROUND( spps.`approveAmount` / REPLACE(sph.`subcontractAmount`, ",", "") * 100, 2 ) AS ratio, FORMAT(spps.approveAmount, 2) AS amount, spps.`confirmTime`, spps.`paymentTime`, spps.`remark`, spps.`id` AS sseId, spps.`confirmTime` AS createTime, ui.`username` createBy, NULL AS updateTime, NULL AS updateBy FROM `pm_subcontract_project_payment_sse` spps LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_header` sph ON sph.`subcontractNo` = REPLACE(spps.`subcontractNo`, " ", "") LEFT JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_payment` spp ON spps.`id` = spp.`sseId` LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON spps.`workNo` = SUBSTR(ui.`username`, 2) WHERE sph.id IS NOT NULL AND spp.`sseId` IS NULL ORDER BY spps.`confirmTime`, sph.id
mapper.update: UPDATE `pm_subcontract_project_payment` spp INNER JOIN `pm_subcontract_project_payment_sse` spps ON spp.`sseId` = spps.`id` SET spp.`paymentTime` = IFNULL(spp.`paymentTime`, spps.`paymentTime`), spp.`remark` = IFNULL(spp.`remark`, spps.`remark`) WHERE spp.`paymentTime` IS NULL
mapper.sql: SELECT depNum AS dimDepartment, depName AS dimDepartmentName, buCode AS dimBU, buName AS dimBUName, productLineCode AS dimProductLine, productLineName AS dimProductLineName, officeCode AS dimTerritory, officeName AS dimTerritoryName, industryCode AS dimIndustry,industryName AS dimIndustryName FROM offer_dimension_default_mapping WHERE depNum = #{depNum} AND `status` = 1 LIMIT 1
